mapper.insert: /* retentionLmsMapper.insertRetentionLmsTrgt */ INSERT INTO RETENTION_LMS_SEND_MST ( REF_YM , CONTRACT_NUM , CTN , OPEN_DT , RESULT_YN , REGST_ID , REGST_DTTM , RVISN_ID , RVISN_DTTM ) SELECT TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMM') AS REF_YM , A.CONTRACT_NUM , A.SUBSCRIBER_NO AS CTN , A.LST_COM_ACTV_DATE AS OPEN_DT , 'N' AS RESULT_YN , '운영팀' AS REGST_ID , SYSDATE AS REGST_DTTM , '운영팀' AS RVISN_ID , SYSDATE AS RVISN_DTTM FROM MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO A , MSP_REQUEST_DTL B WHERE 1=1 AND A.CONTRACT_NUM = B.CONTRACT_NUM AND B.REQ_BUY_TYPE = 'MM' --단말 AND A.SUB_STATUS = 'A' --사용중인고객 AND A.CONTRACT_NUM NOT IN (SELECT CONTRACT_NUM FROM MSP_JUO_ADD_INFO WHERE EVNT_CD = 'C07' AND MODEL_CHN_CD = '01') --우수기변고객 제외 AND A.CONTRACT_NUM NOT IN (SELECT DISTINCT CONTRACT_NUM FROM MSP_JUO_ADD_INFO WHERE SIM_START_DT IS NOT NULL) --재약정고객 제외 AND FN_GET_AGE_NEW(CRYPTO_AES256.DEC_AES(A.USER_SSN)) BETWEEN '20' AND '79' --20~70대 AND TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(A.LST_COM_ACTV_DATE,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'),30),'YYYYMM') = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMM') --30개월차 도래 고객 AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT CONTRACT_NUM FROM RETENTION_LMS_SEND_MST WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = A.CONTRACT_NUM)
mapper.select: /* retentionLmsMapper.selectLmsSendList */ SELECT REF_YM , CONTRACT_NUM , CTN , OPEN_DT , RESULT_YN FROM RETENTION_LMS_SEND_MST WHERE RESULT_YN = 'N' AND REF_YM = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMM') AND ROWNUM <= #{maxCnt}
mapper.update: UPDATE RETENTION_LMS_SEND_MST SET RESULT_YN = 'Y' , RVISN_ID = 'BATCH' , RVISN_DTTM = SYSDATE WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = #{contractNum}
